channel.title: Railway on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in Railway on Gajab Jobs

item.title: IRFC Assistant Manager Online Form 2026
item.description: Indian Railway Finance Corporation (IRFC) has announced Recruitment 2026 for Assistant (NE5) and Assistant Manager (Finance) posts with 23 total vacancies. The online application process begins on 04/04/2026 and will close on 01/05/2026. Candidates with B.Com along with CA/CMA or MBA (Finance) are eligible to apply. Selection will be based on CBT, document verification, interview (for Manager), and medical test. This recruitment offers an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking a high-paying PSU job with salary up to ₹16 LPA.
